title: Payments Planned Maintenance Calendar
content: Payments planned maintenance calendar. Settlement replay maintenance is scheduled for 2026-07-22 from 01:00Z to 02:00Z. During this window, HighKafkaConsumerLag may increase while replay is paused and resumed. Before escalating, check the maintenance window, confirm replay status with settlement-ops, and monitor lag slope for 15 minutes after replay resumes.
